title: Better Spy Glass
description: This mod allows you to scope in on SpyGlass item using mouse scroll.
body:
# Discription
This mod allows you to scope in on SpyGlass item using mouse scroll. 
## Progress
- Scope on scroll: done
- Smooth mouse sens: done
- Mod menu with sens and scope setups: in progress

---
I tried to make this mode feels vanila for your pleasure)

If you have any qestions or suggestions you can leave them in issues sections on the mod`s github project.
